cross_connections.display_label: hosted the president's secret cancer surgery on his yacht
taught him at Clinton Academy, then married into the family

narrative_blocks.header: He hid cancer surgery aboard a friend's yacht
narrative_blocks.body: In 1893, to avoid panicking a fragile economy, Cleveland had a tumor cut from his jaw in secret aboard a yacht at sea. The operation stayed hidden from the public for years.

narrative_blocks.header: His schoolteacher married into this tree
narrative_blocks.body: As a boy at Clinton Academy, Cleveland was taught by Elliott Anthony — who went on to marry Mary Dwight, a seventh-generation Hooker descendant, and to a Chicago judgeship. Teacher and pupil crossed paths long before either knew what the other would become.
